CVE-2024-52762.title: A cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in the component /mast ...
CVE-2024-52762.description: A cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in the component /master/header.php of Ganglia-web v3.73 to v3.76 allows attackers to execute arbitrary web scripts or HTML via a crafted payload injected into the "tz" parameter.
